你.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 亻 (person) + phonetic 尔; alternative analysis as ideogrammic compound 人+尔 also noted.

对.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound (會意): 丵 (digging tool) + 土 (earth) + 又 (hand); original meaning unclear, later borrowed to mean 'to reply'.

能.wiki_summary: Pictogram (象形) depicting a bear, with paw elements styled as 匕 and an open-mouthed face represented as 月.

而.wiki_summary: Pictogram (象形) of a beard; original form of 耏/髵.

子.wiki_summary: Pictogram (象形) depicting a baby with large head and spread arms, legs wrapped in a blanket.

那.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound (形聲): phonetic 冉 + semantic 邑 (city); originally a state name, later borrowed as a distal demonstrative.

得.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound (會意): 貝 (cowry) + 又 (hand) meaning to pick up a cowry; 彳 later added to show pickup on a road.

于.wiki_summary: Pictogram (象形) of an ancient wind instrument (mainstream view) or exhaled air; trad. form 於 derives from a variant of 烏.

着.wiki_summary: Wiktionary classifies 著 as a phono-semantic compound (形聲): semantic 艸 (grass/plant) + phonetic 者; 着 is a simplified/vulgar form of 著.
着.difference: Our data classifies 着 as loan_character; Wiktionary classifies the glyph 著 as phono_semantic_compound. The loan_character label describes the usage relationship between 着 and 著, not the formation of the original glyph.

下.wiki_summary: Ideogram (指事): short horizontal stroke below a long arc, contrasting with 上 to indicate 'below'.
